data.title: Dalata Hotel Group Discloses Regulatory Dealings Under Irish Takeover Rules
data.description:
Dalata Hotel ( (GB:DAL) ) has provided an update.

Dalata Hotel Group PLC has disclosed dealings under the Irish Takeover Panel Act, 1997, as part of regulatory requirements. The disclosure includes purchases made by the Employee Benefit Trust for the benefit of current and future employees, highlighting the company’s commitment to its workforce. This move may impact the company’s market positioning by demonstrating its strategic financial management and stakeholder engagement.

More about Dalata Hotel

Dalata Hotel Group PLC is a prominent player in the hospitality industry, primarily offering hotel services. The company is known for its focus on providing quality accommodations and has a significant presence in the market, catering to both business and leisure travelers.

data.title: Fairchild Gold Corp Completes Strategic Acquisition of Koba Resources
data.description:
The latest update is out from Fairchild Gold Corp. ( (TSE:FAIR) ).

Fairchild Gold Corp has successfully completed its acquisition of Koba Resources Ltd, significantly enhancing its position in the Goodsprings mining district of Nevada. This strategic acquisition includes a substantial database of geological data, allowing Fairchild to expedite its exploration and drilling plans, thereby strengthening its market position as a leading claim holder in the region.

More about Fairchild Gold Corp.

Fairchild Gold Corp operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold exploration and development. The company is dedicated to expanding its presence in historically productive mining districts, with a particular emphasis on acquiring and consolidating land claims to enhance its exploration capabilities.

data.title: Barclays’ Voting Rights in Berkeley Group Fall Below Threshold
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from The Berkeley Group Holdings ( (GB:BKG) ).

The Berkeley Group Holdings PLC announced a change in voting rights as Barclays PLC has crossed a threshold in its holdings. The notification indicates that Barclays’ voting rights have fallen below the minimum threshold, which may impact its influence on company decisions. This development is significant for stakeholders as it could alter the dynamics of shareholder power within the company.

More about The Berkeley Group Holdings

The Berkeley Group Holdings PLC is a UK-based company operating in the real estate industry, primarily focusing on residential property development. The company is known for its high-quality homes and urban regeneration projects, catering to a market that values sustainable and innovative housing solutions.

data.title: Sunrise Resources Passes AGM Resolutions Amid Shareholder Concerns
data.description:
Sunrise Resources ( (GB:SRES) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Sunrise Resources Plc announced the successful passing of all resolutions at its Annual General Meeting, including the re-election of Mr. James Cole as a director despite significant opposition. The company acknowledges shareholder dissatisfaction with its share price performance, attributing the vote against Mr. Cole as a protest. Additionally, the approval of resolutions allowing the issuance of new shares and dis-application of pre-emption rights provides Sunrise Resources with flexibility to raise capital, crucial for its operations given its lack of regular income. The company plans to continue engaging with shareholders to address concerns and maintain its operational viability.

More about Sunrise Resources

Sunrise Resources Plc operates in the resource exploration and development industry, focusing on identifying and developing mineral projects. The company primarily engages in the exploration of industrial minerals and precious metals, aiming to enhance its market position through strategic project development and partnerships.

data.title: Fidia S.p.A. Converts Bonds into New Shares to Enhance Capital
data.description:
Fidia Spa ( (IT:FDA) ) has shared an announcement.

Fidia S.p.A. has announced the conversion of 10 bonds into 14,285,714 new shares, which will be admitted to trading on Euronext Milan without the need for a prospectus due to regulatory exemptions. This conversion is part of a broader capital increase initiative, with the company’s share capital rising to Euro 15,773,000 and the total number of shares reaching 185,796,995, indicating a strategic move to strengthen its financial position.

More about Fidia Spa

Fidia S.p.A., based in San Mauro Torinese, is a global leader in designing, producing, and marketing high-performance integrated milling systems, primarily for the automotive and aerospace sectors. With over 40 years of experience and around 147 employees, Fidia offers comprehensive solutions for the entire milling process, including numerical controls, high-speed milling systems, and CAM software.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: €432.2K

data.title: Global Uranium Corp. Launches C$1M Private Placement for Exploration
data.description:
Global Uranium Corp. ( (TSE:GURN) ) has provided an update.

Global Uranium Corp. announced a non-brokered private placement to raise up to C$1,000,000 through the sale of units, each consisting of one common share and a warrant to purchase an additional share. The funds will be used for exploration activities, including at the Northwest Athabasca Project, and for general corporate purposes. The offering is subject to regulatory approvals and is expected to close by April 25, 2025.

More about Global Uranium Corp.

Global Uranium Corp. focuses on exploring and developing uranium assets primarily in North America. The company holds key uranium projects including the Wing Lake Property in Northern Saskatchewan, Canada, the Northwest Athabasca Joint Venture in Saskatchewan, Canada, and several district projects in Wyoming, USA.

data.title: ENGIE Finalizes Nuclear Agreement with Belgian Government
data.description:
An announcement from Engie SA ( (FR:ENGI) ) is now available.

ENGIE has finalized an agreement with the Belgian government to extend the operation of the Tihange 3 and Doel 4 nuclear reactors for 10 years and transfer nuclear waste responsibilities to the government. This agreement, approved by the European Commission, includes a joint venture ownership of the reactors and a contract for difference mechanism, reducing ENGIE’s exposure to future waste treatment costs.

More about Engie SA

ENGIE is a leading company in the energy transition sector, focused on accelerating the shift towards a carbon-neutral economy. With operations in 30 countries and a workforce of 98,000 employees, ENGIE’s activities span the entire energy value chain, including renewable electricity and green gas production, energy transmission and distribution, and local energy infrastructures. The company invests over €10 billion annually to support its net-zero carbon goal by 2045 and is publicly traded on the Paris and Brussels stock exchanges.

YTD Price Performance: 12.71%

Average Trading Volume: 2,563,951

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €41.65B

data.title: BW LPG Limited Updates 2025 Financial Calendar
data.description:
BW LPG Ltd ( (GB:0QIX) ) has issued an update.

On March 14, 2025, BW LPG Limited announced its updated financial calendar for the upcoming year. The company plans to release its 2024 Annual Report on March 28, 2025, followed by its Annual General Meeting on May 15, 2025. The quarterly and half-yearly reports for 2025 are scheduled for May 20, August 26, and December 2. This announcement provides stakeholders with a clear timeline for the company’s financial disclosures, which is crucial for maintaining transparency and investor confidence.

More about BW LPG Ltd

BW LPG is the world’s leading owner and operator of LPG vessels, specializing in Very Large Gas Carriers (VLGC) with a total carrying capacity exceeding 4 million CBM. With over five decades of experience in LPG shipping, the company also has an in-house LPG trading division and is expanding its presence in LPG terminal infrastructure and distribution. BW LPG is part of the BW Group, a global maritime leader with a fleet of over 450 vessels and investments in renewable energy.
